task:
In Brave, in the first tab visit https://httpbin.org/html and then navigate that same tab to https://httpbin.org/forms/post (a pizza order form). Then open a second tab to https://example.com and bookmark it.

When done, two tabs must be open: one showing https://httpbin.org/forms/post and one showing https://example.com. The example.com tab must contain an `h1` element, and https://httpbin.org/html must appear in browsing history.

verification.description: example.com page has an h1 element
httpbin.org/html was visited in browsing history
